summary: KEZA is functional but has critical gaps in test coverage, Farelytics accuracy, and UX clarity. Direct program bias bug is revenue-blocking.

findings.title: Direct Program Bias
findings.description: Overrides cheapest option by 40% to show expensive home-carrier as best deal
findings.impact: Revenue-blocking: costs users $50-500 per booking, erodes trust
findings.recommendation: Reduce threshold to 5-10% or require DIRECT within $5 of cheapest

findings.title: Unknown Zone Fallback to EUROPE
findings.description: Silently treats unmapped airports as EUROPE, causing 2-3x cost overestimation
findings.impact: App loses credibility on non-hub routes (e.g., BJS→LAX shows 150k vs 80k correct)
findings.recommendation: Implement distance-based fallback or add logging

findings.title: Rounding Inconsistency in Acquisition Savings
findings.description: Uses Math.round instead of roundPrice(), causing $0.01-0.05 discrepancies
findings.impact: Users see inconsistent savings figures between acquisition and transfer options

findings.title: Dynamic Estimation Formula Inconsistency
findings.description: Inline rounding loses precision vs roundPrice elsewhere
findings.impact: Small redemptions and premium cabins lose accuracy ($10-50 errors)

findings.title: Zone Fallback Floods Calendar
findings.description: Zone fallback adds 5-10 irrelevant programs to month-matrix results
findings.impact: Calendar searches confusing rankings
findings.recommendation: Restrict fallback to corridor-guaranteed programs only

findings.title: Auto-Calibration Too Conservative
findings.description: Outlier rejection threshold ignores premium cabin sweet spots (>5¢/mile)
findings.impact: Auto-calibration biased toward economy, ignores business class data

findings.title: Self-Learning System Lags Market
findings.description: Time decay weights old observations too heavily (30-day decay)
findings.impact: Self-calibration lags 2-3 weeks behind mile value changes

findings.title: Potential Double-Counting of Roundtrip Taxes
findings.description: Roundtrip tax multiplication may be applied at wrong level
findings.impact: Roundtrip taxes may show 2x too high
findings.recommendation: Verify getMilesRequired semantics; standardize on ONE-WAY returns

findings.title: Accessibility Score Fallback Contradictory
findings.description: Treats score-3 as accessible when should default to score-2
findings.impact: Undefined program scores chosen over better scores

findings.title: LATAM Pass Filtering Blocks Valid Redemptions
findings.description: Filtering blocks ALLIANCE redemptions on codeshare flights outside Americas
findings.impact: Users miss LATAM on codeshare flights
findings.recommendation: Remove filter or apply only on routes with 0 LATAM presence

findings.title: UK APD Tax Cap Not Zone-Aware
findings.description: UK APD cap doesn't vary by destination zone
findings.impact: LHR→JFK shows $150 when should be $200 (understates by $25-50)
findings.recommendation: Check destination zone; apply $200 for non-EU departures

findings.title: Estimated Cabin Price Downgrade Too Conservative
findings.description: Calendar downgrade too aggressive, hides savings
findings.impact: Calendar searches show neutral recommendation when miles 15% cheaper
findings.recommendation: Only downgrade if savings <$20 or <2% of cash price

findings.title: Stream API Endpoint Zero Coverage
findings.description: No tests for streaming search endpoint (error propagation, disconnect, partial results)
findings.impact: Streaming can hang or lose data silently

findings.title: Calendar API Endpoint Zero Coverage
findings.description: No tests for calendar/heatmap endpoint (month validation, cache, fallback)
findings.impact: Users see incomplete/wrong 6-month heatmap data

findings.title: Flight Enrichment Zero Coverage
findings.description: No unit tests on core enrich() function (program attachment, price calculation, edge cases)
findings.impact: Silent bugs in flight data transformation

findings.title: No Coverage Thresholds in CI
findings.description: Coverage can regress to 0% without detection
findings.impact: Test quality degrades silently

findings.title: Missing Result Counts on Filter Tabs
findings.description: Tab headers don't show how many results in each tab
findings.impact: Users don't know what to expect when clicking tab

findings.title: Generic Empty States
findings.description: Empty state doesn't explain why results are missing
findings.impact: Users confused about search criteria
findings.recommendation: Show 'No flights found for this cabin/date. Try adjusting criteria.'

findings.title: Cabin Abbreviations Confusing
findings.description: Uses 'Prem', 'Bus', 'Eco' — new users confused
findings.impact: Cognitive load for non-expert users

findings.title: Form Validation Missing
findings.description: No validation for identical airports (LGA→LAX vs LGA→LAX)
findings.impact: Silent server errors

findings.title: Auto-Cabin-Refire Has No Feedback
findings.description: When user changes cabin, page silently re-searches without indication
findings.impact: Users think page is broken or frozen

findings.title: Filter Tab With No Results Shows Nothing
findings.description: Clicking 'Business' tab with 0 results shows blank — looks like bug
findings.impact: Appears broken, not helpful
findings.recommendation: Show empty state with suggestion to adjust filters

findings.title: Results Heading Lacks Sort Indicator
findings.description: Doesn't show what field is primary sort
findings.impact: Users don't understand ranking

findings.title: Miles Programs Input Not Autocompleted
findings.description: Users must know exact program names
findings.impact: Users give up if they forget exact name

findings.title: Mobile Form Layout Cramped
findings.description: Form buttons overlap on <375px screens
findings.impact: Users can't search on phones

findings.title: Back Button Low Visibility
findings.description: Back button is small text, not prominent
findings.impact: Users scroll to find it
findings.recommendation: Make prominent back arrow in header

findings.title: TRAVELPAYOUTS_TOKEN in URL
findings.description: API token passed in query string, leaks via Referer header and browser history
findings.impact: Token compromise risk, potential account takeover
findings.recommendation: Move to POST body + Authorization header immediately

findings.title: Duffel Errors Not Sanitized
findings.description: Error responses logged without filtering sensitive fields
findings.impact: API key may leak to Sentry if included in error

findings.title: Rate Limit Handling Missing
findings.description: Duffel 429 responses don't parse Retry-After header
findings.impact: Silent fallback to TP without user transparency

findings.title: Array Index as React Key
findings.description: Using array index breaks animation/state on sort/filter
findings.impact: List re-renders incorrectly, state not preserved

findings.title: Missing Error Boundary on Calendar
findings.description: API failure silently hangs forever
findings.impact: Users see frozen heatmap indefinitely

findings.title: Missing Client-Side Cache for Calendar
findings.description: 6 API calls fire on every route change despite server-side Redis
findings.impact: 6x unnecessary API load, hits rate limits

findings.title: Missing React.memo on Expensive Components
findings.description: Components re-render unnecessarily
findings.impact: Recalculates expensive logic on parent updates

findings.title: Missing useCallback on Event Handlers
findings.description: New function created on every render
findings.impact: Wastes reconciliation work
findings.recommendation: Wrap with useCallback if passed to memoized children

roadmap.weeks_2_3_p1: Add test coverage + fix core stability (10 days)
